name: TransactionLifecycleAndCategoryAllocation
description: Append-only transaction lifecycle, statement-authoritative replacement, and single-category Assignment history; other dimensions retain their own explicit histories.
schema_def: transaction_lifecycle_event: id, transactionId, void|superseded|statement_authoritative_replacement, optional replacementTransactionId, optional reconciliationDecisionId, reason, actor, time; at most one active terminal event. category_allocation_event: id, transactionId, categoryId, assign|correct|carry_forward, optional previousEventId/sourceTransactionId/reconciliationDecisionId, reason, actor, time; zero or one active assignment. Statement correction creates one replacement and explicit category/pool carry-forward, compatible payment carry-forward or unknown initialization, and invariant-preserving relationship replacement events inside one transaction. If any required relationship cannot remain valid, no replacement event commits. No state moves by overwrite; historical references use RESTRICT.
